---
title: "Elizabeth Crawford Lockhart"
---

## Elizabeth Crawford Lockhart

### Description

superior of the sisterhood of St Mary the Virgin, Wantage

### Biography

She decided to convert to Rome in June 1850 under Manning's influence, sister of William Lockhart (1819–1892), who converted to Rome and became a Rosminian priest, cousin of J.G.Lockhart [<i>Butler of Wantage</i>,  ODNB the brother]

### Letters

- Letter from Midsummer Day [24 June 1850[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
